stemHtml: Approaching a reporting point, you experience turbulence causing strain against seat belts. Your last routine report was about an hour ago. What should you do?

options.a: Include it in the routine report due in about an hour.
options.b: Report at the reporting point, but moderate turbulence can be omitted.
options.c: Include it in the routine report at the reporting point.
options.d: Make a special air-report and omit the routine report.
